purpose: Damn Vulnerable Web Application (DVWA) is designed to help security professionals test their skills in a controlled environment and to assist developers in understanding web application security.
concerns: Several translations of the README file available.
Warnings about security risks if DVWA is deployed in a public web server.
Configuration scripts require user attention and modifications.
Installation instructions mention needing root permissions.
No executable or functional code in the root directory.

purpose: This branch contains modules demonstrating web vulnerabilities and security concepts, focusing on cryptography and token validation examples.

key_files.name: .htaccess
key_files.role: Configures URL rewriting for API routing.

key_files.name: bootstrap.php
key_files.role: Loads dependencies using Composer's autoload.

key_files.name: index.php
key_files.role: Handles cryptography vulnerability demonstration and page rendering.

key_files.name: check_token_high.php
key_files.role: Processes token validation for high security level.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides an overview and documentation for the project.

key_files.name: LICENSE
key_files.role: Specifies the legal terms under which the project can be used.

concerns: No validation on included files; could lead to including arbitrary files.
No tests found for the functions defined in check_token_high.php.
Potential exposure of sensitive tokens through improper error handling.
Direct response output may lead to information leakage in error messages.

purpose: This branch hosts the main dashboard web application including setup, configuration files, styling, and script resources. It features critical components such as layout styling and content rendering scripts.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Manages project dependencies and scripts.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides project overview and installation instructions.

key_files.name: LICENSE
key_files.role: States the licensing terms for the project.

key_files.name: css/help.css
key_files.role: Styles for help sections with light and dark themes.

key_files.name: css/login.css
key_files.role: Styles for the login page layout and design.

key_files.name: includes/dvwaPage.inc.php
key_files.role: PHP includes for DVWA page structure and session management.

key_files.name: includes/Parsedown.php
key_files.role: Markdown parsing library for converting text.

concerns: Missing detailed contribution guidelines.
Some dependencies may be outdated.
No CI/CD configuration found.
Inconsistent formatting in README document.
Lack of unit tests in the project.

purpose: The .github branch contains configuration files for CI workflows, code analysis, issue templates, and project documentation, ensuring consistency across the application development process.

key_files.name: codeql-analysis.yml
key_files.role: Defines CodeQL analysis workflow for code scanning.

key_files.name: docker-image.yml
key_files.role: Defines workflow for building and pushing Docker images.

key_files.name: bug-report---installation.md
key_files.role: Template for reporting installation-related bugs.

key_files.name: bug-report---vulnerability.md
key_files.role: Template for reporting bugs related to vulnerabilities.

concerns: Workflows may require customization for different projects.
Some workflow steps have commented-out alternatives not in use.
Issue templates lack examples for expected inputs.
No validation for mandatory fields in bug reports.
README lacks contribution guidelines, causing potential user confusion.

purpose: This branch is dedicated to managing all database-related functionalities and configurations for the application, ensuring efficient and secure data storage and retrieval.
Contains testing scripts, configuration files, documentation, and external libraries for DVWA.

key_files.name: tests/test_url.py
key_files.role: Test script for checking URLs in PHP files

key_files.name: config/config.inc.php.dist
key_files.role: Configuration template for DVWA database settings

key_files.name: docs/pdf.html
key_files.role: Documentation link for DVWA

key_files.name: external/recaptcha/recaptchalib.php
key_files.role: PHP library for Google reCAPTCHA integration

concerns: Test URL function needs refactoring to avoid duplicates and handle ignored URLs more cleanly.
There are commented-out sections in config that may cause confusion.
PDF link in documentation might be outdated without version monitoring.
Some test cases may timeout due to reliance on external URLs being accessible.
No explicit tests found for the recaptcha functions.
